title: Effortless Fund Recovery
description: We manage your case from start to finish, leveraging global partnerships, forensic investigators, and financial institutions to build a strong claim. You’ll stay informed at every stage, ensuring clarity, confidence, and peace of mind throughout the process.

title: Success-Based Fees
description: We only charge if we successfully recover your funds. Our pricing is transparent-10% of recovered funds, capped at $30,000. Our upfront administrative fee of $3,500 covers case assessment, global investigations, and direct engagement with banks and regulators.

title: Global Fraud Recovery Leaders
description: As a globally recognized firm, we operate across North America, Europe, Asia, and Australia, collaborating with financial watchdogs, private investigators, and law enforcement to accelerate fund recovery and bring fraudsters to justice.

title: Unrivaled Expertise in Financial Crimes
description: Our team consists of fraud recovery specialists with backgrounds in the FCA, SEC, FOS, MAS, major financial institutions, and investigative agencies. With our expertise, you’re backed by industry leaders in asset tracing, regulatory disputes, and fraud resolution.
